title: Commission.enabled_builtin_tools=[] hides every built-in tool
description: enabled_builtin_tools maps descriptor.agent_name to a subtractive allow-list over that agent's tool surface (descriptor.tools). An empty list under the running agent's key exposes none: agent_started.data.avp.tools MUST be an empty array, so the model gets no tools. The run still completes normally. The ${AGENT_NAME} fixture token expands to the agent-under-test's descriptor.agent_name. Cross-agent: goose doesn't load its developer extension; claude filters the merged tool bag to the (empty) allow-list.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
